Rank the key drivers behind the current result and explain the largest contributors. Narrative Chart Table Sql The largest contributors to total sales are Phones (Technology) and Chairs (Furniture), with sales of 330,007 and 328,449 respectively, followed by Storage (Office Supplies) at 223,844. In terms of profit, Copiers (Technology) is the top driver with 55,618, while Phones and Accessories also contribute significantly with profits of 44,516 and 41,937. Notably, Tables and Bookcases (Furniture) have negative profits, indicating they are detractors from overall profitability despite high sales.
